# Erä Outfitters

> A modern Southern field and fly shop coming to Historic Downtown Roswell, Georgia.

Erä Outfitters is a field & fly shop blending fly fishing, upland hunting, and heritage outdoor apparel. The name comes from an ancient Finnish word meaning a share of wild places — the same cultural root as Finland's everyman's right to roam.

## About the Shop

- **Type:** Specialty outdoor retail — field & fly shop
- **Location:** Historic Downtown Roswell, Georgia (coming soon)
- **Focus:** Fly fishing, upland hunting, heritage outdoor apparel
- **Ethos:** Hobbies should be fun, not intimidating or pretentious.

## What We Sell

- Fly fishing tackle for Southern tailwaters (Chattahoochee River, Toccoa River)
- Upland hunting gear for dove, quail, and all upland birds
- Heritage outdoor apparel

## Community & Events

- Seasonal hunts: dove, quail, and upland bird seasons
- Crawfish Boils (Spring Series)
- Pig Roasts & Live Music (Summer Series)
- Guided fishing and testing grounds (Phase 2)

## Contact & Links

- Website: https://eraoutfitters.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/eraoutfitter
- Location: Roswell, Georgia, USA
